---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-banner}
# Projects
Academic and personal projects in data analytics and machine learning
:::

::: {.page-content}

```{=html}
<div class="projects-grid">

  <div class="proj-card">
    <div class="proj-card-top">
      <div class="proj-tags">
        <span class="proj-tag">PySpark</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">SQL</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">Python</span>
      </div>
      <a class="proj-github-btn" href="https://github.com/AD688-SP26/a02-sp26-jessbenun-1" target="_blank">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 0C5.37 0 0 5.37 0 12c0 5.31 3.435 9.795 8.205 11.385.6.105.825-.255.825-.57 0-.285-.015-1.23-.015-2.235-3.015.555-3.795-.735-4.035-1.41-.135-.345-.72-1.41-1.23-1.695-.42-.225-1.02-.78-.015-.795.945-.015 1.62.87 1.845 1.23 1.08 1.815 2.805 1.305 3.495.99.105-.78.42-1.305.765-1.605-2.67-.3-5.46-1.335-5.46-5.925 0-1.305.465-2.385 1.23-3.225-.12-.3-.54-1.53.12-3.18 0 0 1.005-.315 3.3 1.23.96-.27 1.98-.405 3-.405s2.04.135 3 .405c2.295-1.56 3.3-1.23 3.3-1.23.66 1.65.24 2.88.12 3.18.765.84 1.23 1.905 1.23 3.225 0 4.605-2.805 5.625-5.475 5.925.435.375.81 1.095.81 2.22 0 1.605-.015 2.895-.015 3.3 0 .315.225.69.825.57A12.02 12.02 0 0 0 24 12c0-6.63-5.37-12-12-12z"/></svg>
        View on GitHub
      </a>
    </div>
    <h3 class="proj-title">Spark SQL & Job Market Analysis</h3>
    <p class="proj-desc">Analyzed 70,000+ job postings using Spark SQL and DataFrames to uncover salary trends by job title, rank top companies offering remote roles in California, track monthly posting fluctuations, and compare compensation across major U.S. cities.</p>
    <div class="proj-highlights">
      <div class="proj-highlight">
        <span class="highlight-num">4</span>
        <span class="highlight-label">SQL queries</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-highlight">
        <span class="highlight-num">70K+</span>
        <span class="highlight-label">job postings</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-highlight">
        <span class="highlight-num">5</span>
        <span class="highlight-label">U.S. cities</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <a class="proj-live-btn" href="https://ad688-sp26.github.io/a02-sp26-jessbenun-1/" target="_blank">View live report →</a>
  </div>

  <div class="proj-card">
    <div class="proj-card-top">
      <div class="proj-tags">
        <span class="proj-tag">PySpark</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">Plotly</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">Big Data</span>
      </div>
      <a class="proj-github-btn" href="https://github.com/AD688-SP26/a03-sp26-jessbenun" target="_blank">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 0C5.37 0 0 5.37 0 12c0 5.31 3.435 9.795 8.205 11.385.6.105.825-.255.825-.57 0-.285-.015-1.23-.015-2.235-3.015.555-3.795-.735-4.035-1.41-.135-.345-.72-1.41-1.23-1.695-.42-.225-1.02-.78-.015-.795.945-.015 1.62.87 1.845 1.23 1.08 1.815 2.805 1.305 3.495.99.105-.78.42-1.305.765-1.605-2.67-.3-5.46-1.335-5.46-5.925 0-1.305.465-2.385 1.23-3.225-.12-.3-.54-1.53.12-3.18 0 0 1.005-.315 3.3 1.23.96-.27 1.98-.405 3-.405s2.04.135 3 .405c2.295-1.56 3.3-1.23 3.3-1.23.66 1.65.24 2.88.12 3.18.765.84 1.23 1.905 1.23 3.225 0 4.605-2.805 5.625-5.475 5.925.435.375.81 1.095.81 2.22 0 1.605-.015 2.895-.015 3.3 0 .315.225.69.825.57A12.02 12.02 0 0 0 24 12c0-6.63-5.37-12-12-12z"/></svg>
        View on GitHub
      </a>
    </div>
    <h3 class="proj-title">Big Data Visualization at Scale</h3>
    <p class="proj-desc">Built interactive visualizations across 72,000+ job postings using PySpark and Plotly — including box plots for salary by industry, bubble charts for occupation vs. median pay, scatter plots for experience vs. salary by education level, and histograms comparing remote, hybrid, and onsite compensation.</p>
    <div class="proj-highlights">
      <div class="proj-highlight">
        <span class="highlight-num">72K+</span>
        <span class="highlight-label">job postings</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-highlight">
        <span class="highlight-num">5</span>
        <span class="highlight-label">visualizations</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-highlight">
        <span class="highlight-num">3</span>
        <span class="highlight-label">work types</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="proj-card">
    <div class="proj-card-top">
      <div class="proj-tags">
        <span class="proj-tag">Machine Learning</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">PySpark</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">Regression</span>
      </div>
      <a class="proj-github-btn" href="https://github.com/AD688-SP26/a04-sp26-jessbenun-2" target="_blank">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 0C5.37 0 0 5.37 0 12c0 5.31 3.435 9.795 8.205 11.385.6.105.825-.255.825-.57 0-.285-.015-1.23-.015-2.235-3.015.555-3.795-.735-4.035-1.41-.135-.345-.72-1.41-1.23-1.695-.42-.225-1.02-.78-.015-.795.945-.015 1.62.87 1.845 1.23 1.08 1.815 2.805 1.305 3.495.99.105-.78.42-1.305.765-1.605-2.67-.3-5.46-1.335-5.46-5.925 0-1.305.465-2.385 1.23-3.225-.12-.3-.54-1.53.12-3.18 0 0 1.005-.315 3.3 1.23.96-.27 1.98-.405 3-.405s2.04.135 3 .405c2.295-1.56 3.3-1.23 3.3-1.23.66 1.65.24 2.88.12 3.18.765.84 1.23 1.905 1.23 3.225 0 4.605-2.805 5.625-5.475 5.925.435.375.81 1.095.81 2.22 0 1.605-.015 2.895-.015 3.3 0 .315.225.69.825.57A12.02 12.02 0 0 0 24 12c0-6.63-5.37-12-12-12z"/></svg>
        View on GitHub
      </a>
    </div>
    <h3 class="proj-title">Salary Prediction with Regression Models</h3>
    <p class="proj-desc">Built and compared four machine learning models — Linear, Generalized Linear, Polynomial, and Random Forest Regression — to predict salaries from 32,000+ job postings. Minimum years of experience was the strongest predictor (72% feature importance in Random Forest), with the best model achieving an RMSE of ~$40,500.</p>
    <div class="proj-highlights">
      <div class="proj-highlight">
        <span class="highlight-num">4</span>
        <span class="highlight-label">ML models</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-highlight">
        <span class="highlight-num">32K+</span>
        <span class="highlight-label">records</span>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-highlight">
        <span class="highlight-num">72%</span>
        <span class="highlight-label">top feature importance</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

:::
